identity.name: Nuvei
identity.description: Nuvei provides global payment technology infrastructure, enabling businesses to accept next-generation payments, offer payout options, and access card issuing, banking, risk, and fraud management services across 200+ markets.

team.ceo_background: Founder, Chairman and CEO of Nuvei since 2003, previously led the company through multiple growth phases including Goldman Sachs investment in mid-2000s and successful IPO in 2020. Winner of EY Entrepreneur of The Year® 2019 Award in Fintech.

competitive.market_position: Global leader in payment processing with 200+ markets coverage

direct_competitors.name: Stripe
direct_competitors.differentiator: Developer-focused with simpler integration but less global coverage

direct_competitors.name: Adyen
direct_competitors.differentiator: European-based with strong enterprise focus but less North American presence

direct_competitors.name: Paystone
direct_competitors.differentiator: Canada-focused processor with simpler offerings for smaller merchants

direct_competitors.name: Moneris
direct_competitors.differentiator: Canada's largest bank-independent processor focused on domestic market

direct_competitors.name: Checkout.com
direct_competitors.differentiator: Performance-focused with lower fees but less comprehensive service suite

tailwinds: Shift to digital and mobile payments
Growing demand for alternative payment methods globally

news.summary: Nuvei continues aggressive expansion through strategic partnerships including FreedomPay for enterprise payments and WEX for B2B travel payments. Recent high-profile customer wins like SHEIN and MediaMarktSaturn demonstrate strong market traction, while platform integrations with BigCommerce and Nuweb expand distribution channels.

recent_events.event: Partnership with FreedomPay announced to unify enterprise payments globally across physical and digital channels
WEX partnership launched to expand virtual card payments for global travel industry
BigCommerce partnership announced for comprehensive omnichannel payment solutions across North America, Europe and APAC
Advent International completed $6.3B take-private transaction at $34 per share

moat_signals: Processing over $200B in total volume annually
Comprehensive platform covering payments, issuing, banking and risk management

nodes.name: Stripe
nodes.relationship: Direct payment processing competitor with developer focus

nodes.name: Adyen
nodes.relationship: Global payment processor competitor with European base

nodes.name: FreedomPay
nodes.relationship: Enterprise commerce platform partner for unified payments

nodes.name: WEX
nodes.relationship: Virtual card technology partner for B2B travel payments

fit_score.rationale: While Nuvei aligns perfectly with Sagard's FinTech focus and Canadian geography, the company was taken private by Advent International in April 2024 at a $6.3B enterprise value, making it unavailable for investment. The PE-backed status and massive scale put it outside Sagard's typical investment parameters.

confidence.note: Comprehensive data across all key areas with strong entity card anchoring, detailed funding timeline, and extensive recent news coverage, though actual revenue figure of $1.4B significantly exceeds $50M+ ARR category.
